chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 36 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.1543/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on MA NO.1544/2024 (Leave to Appeal) 4. For hearing of main case 01.11.2024 On 25.10.2024 the following order was passed;- “Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Shafiqe Malik, counsel for appellant requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is unwell. Record reflects that since filing of this appeal against acquittal, he is not appearing; however, in the interest of justice and as a last chance, adjourned to 01.11.2024.” Today neither appellant nor his Counsel turned up to pursue the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
